description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: build_autoconf and build_cmake. The build_autoconf job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the repository, compile and run examples with autoconf, compile and run tests with autoconf, and perform a distcheck. The build_cmake job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, check out the repository, create a build directory, configure CMake, build with CMake, and run tests with ctest.
